chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-1055 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on M.A No.9927/2025 (U/A) 2. For order on M.A No.9935/2025 (Exemption) 3. For order on M.A No.9928/2025 (Return of surety) 17.11.2025 None present for the applicant/surety Mr.Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G present in Court in other matters waives notice ********* 1. Granted. 2&3. Through this application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. It appears that vide Order dated 09.9.2025, the applicant/accused Mst.Anmol was granted protective bail by this Court for a period of seven days and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. Thereafter, I.O of the case submitted final challan before the learned trial Court, wherein the name of applicant/accused Mst.Anmol was placed in column No.2 and learned Magistrate accepted the Challan and discharged her from the case vide Order dated 12.9.2025, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. In view of above, listed applications stand disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
